name: Ultimate-AI-Media-Generator-Skill
description: Open-source ai image generator skill and ai video generator skill for Codex, Claude Code, OpenClaw, Cursor, and more. Powered by   CyberBara API with Nano Banana, Sora 2, Seedance, and Kling support. No need to master prompt, this skill optimize your prompt for all kinds of creations like slides, anime and much more.
